creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
In pr: ports/190013 amdmi3 inproperly flagged the port net/spread as not being staged.
However, as it's maintainer, I can assure you that the source, already in the freebsd ports tree, is in fact already staged.
Please un-flag the net/spread, and kindly make the trivial commit ports/190013
references.

Thank you for all your time, and consideration, in this matter.

--Chris

Fix: 

un-flag the net/spread, and kindly make the trivial commit referenced in ports/190013
